notes.sg-intensive-care-medicine: Intensive care medicine is a subspecialty of internal medicine, not psychiatry.
notes.sg-magnetic-resonance-imaging: MRI is a neuroimaging technique, not a subfield of psychiatry itself, though it can be used in psychiatric research.
notes.sg-environmental-health: Environmental health is a broad public health field, not a subfield of psychiatry.
notes.sg-physical-therapy: Physical therapy is a distinct healthcare profession focused on physical rehabilitation, not a subfield of psychiatry.
notes.sg-health-care: Health care is too general and not a specific research subtopic within psychiatry.
notes.sg-confidence-interval: Confidence intervals are statistical concepts, not a research topic in psychiatry.
notes.sg-diabete-mellitus: Diabetes mellitus is an endocrinological and metabolic disorder, not a subfield of psychiatry.
notes.sg-family-medicine: Family medicine is a primary care specialty, not a subfield of psychiatry.
notes.sg-burden-of-disease: Burden of disease is a public health and epidemiology metric, not a subfield of psychiatry.
